# GroupDocs.Comparison MCP Server

MCP server that exposes GroupDocs.Comparison for .NET — compare PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and text documents and produce diff reports via AI agents (Claude, Cursor, VS Code / GitHub Copilot, and other MCP-compatible clients).

## Install

- With dnx (.NET 10 SDK, no install step): `dnx GroupDocs.Comparison.Mcp@26.5.0 --yes`
- As a global dotnet tool: `dotnet tool install -g GroupDocs.Comparison.Mcp` then run `groupdocs-comparison-mcp`
- As a Docker container: `docker run --rm -i -v $(pwd)/documents:/data ghcr.io/groupdocs-comparison/comparison-net-mcp:latest`

## MCP tools

- Compare — compare two documents (source vs target), produce a marked-up result file with the differences highlighted, return a change-count summary; takes optional `sourcePassword` / `targetPassword` for protected documents
- GetDocumentInfo — inspect a single source document and return file type, page count, file size, and per-page dimensions as JSON; no comparison performed; takes optional `password` for protected documents

## Supported formats

PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, ODS, ODP, RTF, TXT, HTML, and 30+ more document and image formats.

## Environment variables

- GROUPDOCS_MCP_STORAGE_PATH — base folder for input + output (defaults to current working directory)
- GROUPDOCS_MCP_OUTPUT_PATH — optional, routes output files to a separate folder
- GROUPDOCS_LICENSE_PATH — path to GroupDocs.Total.lic, omit for evaluation mode (output watermarked)

## Key links

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/GroupDocs.Comparison.Mcp
- Repository: https://github.com/groupdocs-comparison/GroupDocs.Comparison.Mcp
- Docker: ghcr.io/groupdocs-comparison/comparison-net-mcp and docker.io/groupdocs/comparison-net-mcp
- License: MIT

## Example prompts for AI agents

- "Compare old.pdf and new.pdf — what changed?"
- "Diff contract-v1.docx against contract-v2.docx and tell me the change count."
- "Show the differences between budget-q1.xlsx and budget-q2.xlsx."
- "How many edits separate report-draft.docx from report-final.docx?"
- "How many pages does report.pdf have? Who's the author?"
- "Inspect /docs/legal-brief.pdf — what's the file type and page count?"
